name: What should I do first if my website is invisible in AI search results?

mainEntity.name: What should I do first if my website is invisible in AI search results?

acceptedAnswer.text: Start with a visibility audit of your highest-value pages, then fix crawlability, page structure, and schema markup. AI systems need clear headings, fast loading pages, and machine-readable content before they can reliably surface your site in answers.
acceptedAnswer.description: Begin with an AI visibility audit, then fix technical access, page structure, and schema on your most important pages.

description: Begin with an AI visibility audit, then fix technical access, page structure, and schema on your most important pages.
